details.message: reports/board/ directory was missing (expected by governance contract). Created during this run.
reports/board/ was absent at validation time; reports/audit/ and .cursor/automations/ (with README + specs) are present; memory_bank/ has key docs.

Deprecated directory moltbot/ still present at repo root with active code: board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, agents/. CSA_VERDICT_clawdbot_removal.json documents planned removal but directory persists.

Moltbot references found in active code (excluding reports/audit and docs): moltbot/ directory (6+ Python files), scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. These are code/config references, not documentation-only.
